Tezos NFT Marketplace Hic et Nunc Is Offline
articles.description: The Tezos NFT marketplace Hic et Nunc has officially gone offline, marking the end of its operations. The platform, known for its innovative approach to digital art and tokenized assets, had gained significant popularity within the NFT community. The closure has raised questions about the future of decentralized art platforms and the ongoing evolution of the NFT space.
